final_decision_detail: NR3+FCC is best subject; global/holdout/FSS evidence strong; WC2022 raw fail is contextual; proceed to controlled activation plan draft only.

final_readiness_gate_table.evidence: No fixed 2.6 total-xG regression in strength path
NR3+FCC WC2022 Top-5 48.44% (31/64); raw fail preserved
final_readiness_gate_table.notes: Raw status must remain fail; contextual_pass from Top-K/CI only

final_readiness_gate_table.evidence: Copa2024 stable under NR3+FCC regression gates
Euro2024 stable under NR3+FCC regression gates
Category refinement still recommended; FCC improves true A-subtype
NR6 WC2022 0.5 one-match fragile; NR6 LL worse 0.982
Matrix calibration not justified; materiality None
P1.7B.19: scoreline prototype not needed before final audit
P1.7B.20 does not change defaults; feature flag off by default required
Direct activation blocked until controlled plan with shadow/dark launch
Manual approval required before any production activation
No dataset-specific correction in FCC or NR3 stack
Research sequence complete without post-hoc grid on WC2022
No market odds, static OAF, or GLOBAL_XG_AVG in stack

wc2022_raw_gate.evidence: NR3+FCC WC2022 Top-5 48.44% (31/64); raw fail preserved
wc2022_raw_gate.notes: Raw status must remain fail; contextual_pass from Top-K/CI only

audit_subject_assessment.why_NR3_FCC: Best combined global metrics with FCC FSS/A improvement; regression-safe; holdouts stable; WC2022 raw fail contextualized by Top-K/CI.
audit_subject_assessment.why_not_NR6: WC2022 Top-5 pass is one-match fragile (Wales vs Iran); nr6_only_hits=1; higher LL (0.982) and worse A-subtype than NR3+FCC.
audit_subject_assessment.why_not_NR3_alone: FCC materially reduces FSS/A-subtype without global or holdout regression; same global Top-5 as NR3.
audit_subject_assessment.why_not_HB3: WC2022 Top-5 weaker (0.4375); anchor only, not final subject.

remaining_blocker_analysis.detail: Materially improved by FCC; continue monitoring
Optional future category refinement; not blocking controlled plan
Auxiliary dataset only; do not use as sole activation evidence
Controlled rollout with holdout monitoring required
Explicit approval, dark launch, rollback switch required

minimum_safety_controls: favorite_confidence_curve_params remains None in production until approved
explicit git-tagged release for any future activation
required_monitoring: WC2022 Top-5 raw and Top-K context

risk_mitigation_table.mitigation: Report raw fail + Top-K/CI context in rollout monitoring
Do not tune to one match; monitor Top-6/7 alongside Top-5
Use CI and Top-K context in go/no-go decisions
Do not prefer NR6 on raw Top-5 alone
Monitor rank-6-10 misses in shadow mode
Auxiliary only; not sole activation evidence

risk_mitigation_table.required_next_evidence: Fresh holdout evaluation at plan time
